title: Connect Boards columns not visible in Shareable Link View
excerpt:
We have a board that we routinely need to show to external coworkers. Currently, the shareable link view doesn’t display Connect Boards columns, even to boards that are also public. Could you please enable this feature? 
…

posts.author: louisgordon (Louis Gordon)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a board that we routinely need to show to external coworkers. Currently, the shareable link view doesn’t display Connect Boards columns, even to boards that are also public. Could you please enable this feature?

Thanks!
